mechanics.excerpt: lose Well-Connected but gain Brave you back down and break off the relationship; keep Well-Connected_ but also become Timid] Weekend cruises with the folks [Piloting /Naval +1] You're great at the Mech sims_ but all that playing rots your brain [Natura Aptitude /Piloting / 'Mech Slow Learner; Piloting / Mech +1 Tactics Mech +1] Every school needs source and you happened to be in the wrong place at the right time (SOC Contact; Wealth, Appraisal +1 Negotiation +2, Streetwise +1] Honor Student [Contact; Academic Any +2, Computers +2, Language Any +1 Relative dies and leaves you his vehicle [Vehicle 3), Owns Vehicle] [Choose one event roll twice and apply both results] TRUEBORN BIBKO Clan Affiliation only At this stage, YOU begin individual training MechWarrior, pilot or elemental skills_ Before Clan children reach what the Inner Sphere considers adulthood_ they have already learned all the skills they need to be full-fledged warriors.
